alt: Hoatzin showing its robust body and long tail feathers against a tree branch
caption: Reaching up to 26 inches in length, their heavy bodies are packed with a massive crop used for breaking down tough leaves.
acquisitionNotes: Excellent detailed shot highlighting physical proportions and relative size. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/a/a5/Opisthocomus_hoazin_-_Flickr_-_Dick_Culbert.jpg
attributionText: Photo by Dick Culbert from Gibsons, B.C., Canada via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0
